table.name: vtiger_target
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_target` ( `targetid` int(11) NOT NULL, `target_no` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `target_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `value` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `target_status` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`targetid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8

table.name: vtiger_targetcf
table.sql: CREATE TABLE `vtiger_targetcf` ( `targetid` int(11) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`targetid`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8
